summary: Acts as a universal, decoupled service that loads, manages, and serves multiple, distinct Holon Knowledge Graph (HKG) trees for consumption by any other feature.

listensFor.summary: Switches the primary view of the Knowledge Graph feature (e.g., to Inspector, Import, Export).
The public, universal action for any feature to request the full context of a specific HKG. The response will be delivered privately to the originator.

personaId.description: The root holon ID of the requested HKG.

correlationId.description: An ID for the requester to track the response.

listensFor.summary: A UI-facing action to set which HKG is currently being displayed in the Knowledge Graph view.
A UI-facing action to select a specific holon for detailed inspection within the active view.
Initiates the analysis of a selected directory for HKG import.
Allows the user to override the automatically determined import action for a specific file.
Triggers the execution of the currently staged import plan.
Creates a new AI Persona Root holon, establishing a new, empty HKG.
Deletes an entire HKG by deleting its root persona directory.
Creates or updates a holon file within a loaded HKG.
Deletes a holon file from a loaded HKG.

publishes.summary: Broadcasts the list of all discovered, valid AI_Persona_Root holon headers, allowing other features (like the UI) to know which HKGs are available.
[INTERNAL] Dispatched when a valid AI_Persona_Root is found and parsed during startup.

payload_schema.description: Contains the full HolonHeader of the discovered persona.

publishes.summary: [INTERNAL] Dispatched when a single holon's content is parsed and added to the graph.
[INTERNAL] Dispatched after an import analysis is complete, containing the list of proposed actions.
[INTERNAL] Dispatched when loading or parsing fails fatally.

private_envelopes.summary: The private response envelope sent to a feature that dispatched 'knowledgegraph.REQUEST_CONTEXT'. Contains the compiled HKG content.

context.description: A map of Holon IDs to their raw string content.
